segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with a wide shot of a bright, colorful studio set designed like a casual dining area, where a group of participants in white outfits are seated at tables, conversing and eating. A clear male announcer's voice introduces the game, explaining, "The task is called, this is a what what what. Three people need to sit on stools, and there are three items. We will pass it from the first person to the next person. In the correct rhythm, say the correct chant, at least three rounds must be passed for the challenge to be considered complete." The scene then cuts to a close-up of three participants in matching yellow tracksuits, labeled 1, 2, and 3, seated around a small table. They are actively engaged in the game, passing a small white object while chanting in unison, "这是一个太阳伞" (This is a parasol), then "这是一个苍蝇拍" (This is a fly swatter), "这是一个苍蝇球" (This is a fly ball), and "这是一个苍蝇伞" (This is a fly umbrella), accompanied by laughter and playful sounds. On-screen text confirms they are '传递物品' (passing items) and '说对口令' (say the correct chant). The camera alternates between close-ups of their playful expressions and wider shots showing the amused reactions of the participants in white outfits. The male announcer's voice returns to add, "All eight members, every member must participate for the challenge to be considered complete." The atmosphere remains lighthearted and comedic, enhanced by animated graphics, including a cartoon director character with flames and text like '质疑' (doubt). A woman with dark hair, identified by on-screen text as '孟指导上线' (Meng Director Online), humorously questions, "Who invented this game?" Another male voice comments, "It's so abstract." The woman with blonde hair and a large bow in her hair playfully adds, "This game doesn't feel as good as the lollipop and soap game." Further male voices chime in with surprise and critique, "Wow, this is a tricky game," and expressing disbelief, "Oh my god, 13 episodes, no one has ever dared to do this." The woman with dark hair continues her commentary, comparing the game to others, "If you search for 'lollipop' and 'soap' on that app, that feeling is better than this..." The segment concludes with her leading the commentary, reinforcing the playful, critical tone.

segments.integrated_caption: The video segment opens with a close-up of three food items—a bowl of lotus root soup, a duck neck, and a lobster—displayed on a wooden board, setting up a game or challenge. A male voice is heard identifying "龙虾" (lobster), followed by a brief laugh. The scene transitions to a studio setting with a light blue backdrop featuring the 'Keep Running' logo and cartoon elements. At the center, a man in a white shirt (center focus) is seated between a woman with dark hair in a white jacket and another man in a white shirt. A male voice asks, "可以先试一下吗?" (Can I try it first?), to which another male voice firmly replies, "不用试" (No need to try), a phrase repeated twice. They are engaged in a playful exchange, passing a small white bowl, labeled '莲藕汤' (lotus root soup), and a red object, possibly a chili pepper. A male voice initiates the game, stating, "我先一递，这是一个莲藕汤" (I'll pass it first, this is lotus root soup). The Woman with dark hair then declares, "这是一碗莲藕汤" (This is a bowl of lotus root soup), a phrase echoed by the Man in white shirt. The Woman with blonde hair and bow, identified by a male voice as 'Ziyi', frequently asks "是什么呀？" (What is it?), prompting a male voice to instruct, "不对，紫怡你要把它接过来" (Incorrect, Ziyi, you need to take it). Ziyi acknowledges with "啊，明白了" (Ah, I understand), and the game continues with participants repeatedly identifying the '莲藕汤' and passing the bowl. The Man in white shirt reacts with surprise and amusement, playfully exclaiming "不信不信" (Don't believe it, don't believe it!) twice, amidst laughter. The Woman with dark hair gestures animatedly, appearing to lead the interaction, with on-screen text like '咋还演上了' (Why are you acting now?) and '孟指导上线' (Meng Director Online) emphasizing her humorous critique. She challenges a male participant, asking, "你哪来的自信第一个上的？" (Where did you get the confidence to go first?). Ziyi then comments, "怎么看着那么简单，感觉有点难呢？" (Why does it look so simple, but it feels a bit difficult?), to which a male voice confidently replies, "我觉得挺简单的" (I think it's quite simple). Other participants in white outfits are visible in the background, some eating and others watching, with one standing and moving toward the central table. The lighthearted and comedic atmosphere is punctuated by a distinct gong sound and a whistle. The segment ends with the central trio still engaged in the passing game, the Woman with dark hair smiling broadly, and Ziyi continuing to laugh, as the '莲藕汤' identification game continues.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens in a brightly lit studio, resembling a casual dining area, adorned with the 'Keep Running' logo and '安慕希 爆珠酸奶' promotional graphics. Multiple participants in white outfits are seated, but the focus quickly narrows to a central table where three men are engaged in a playful passing game. A man in the center, reacting with exaggerated discomfort and laughter, becomes the focal point as a small white bowl and a red chili pepper are passed to him. His voice is heard exclaiming '完蛋了!' (I'm done for!) and misidentifying the bowl's contents, saying, '我拿那莲藕汤就说小龙虾,' (I took that lotus root soup and said it was crayfish) followed by '可是一看又不是小龙虾.' (But then I saw it wasn't crayfish.) The man with the name tag '李晨' actively participates, passing the items with animated gestures, contributing to the excited male voices heard throughout the game. The game involves a rapid-fire call-and-response, with multiple male voices chanting, '这是一碗莲藕汤' (This is a bowl of lotus root soup) and '是什么?' (What is it?), then '莲藕汤.' This chant evolves, referencing on-screen text like '小葫芦汤' (Little Gourd Soup) and '这是一个小火锅' (This is a small hot pot), leading to bursts of collective laughter from the participants. A woman with blonde hair and a bow, seated nearby, laughs heartily at the man's reactions, her amusement clearly audible. Other participants in white outfits in the background watch, react with amusement, and join in the collective laughter and chanting. The game's rules are clarified by a male voice stating, '不可以, 你们要传递至少三圈以上, 就得转头.' (No, you have to pass it at least three rounds, then you have to turn your head.) The atmosphere remains lively and humorous, with participants standing, moving, and engaging playfully as the game continues, the man in the center grimacing and laughing, clearly enjoying the challenge. The segment concludes with the ongoing game, underscored by the comedic on-screen text '这是一个xiu~' and the continued chanting.

segments.integrated_caption: The brightly lit studio, designed as a playful dining area with a blue 'Keep Running' backdrop and food-themed decorations, sets the scene for a lively passing game. The Man with name tag '李晨' participates, handing over props and laughing, and is heard asserting, "我说了勾践剑" (I said Goujian sword). The Woman with blonde hair and bow laughs heartily at the reactions. Background participants eat and react with amusement, contributing to the dynamic atmosphere. On-screen text graphics like '挑战成功' (Challenge Successful) and '惊不惊喜' (Surprised or not?) enhance the comedic tone, while a split-screen comparison graphic highlights the messy outcome on the man's hands. The game continues with a slower, more deliberate identification of the items, punctuated by laughter and playful banter, including a male voice suggesting, "好，咱们再倒退一下，慢点啊" (Okay, let's rewind a bit, slowly).

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens in a brightly lit studio, resembling a casual dining area with a blue 'Keep Running' backdrop and city silhouettes. Participants in white outfits are engaged in a lively passing game at wooden tables, involving a small white bowl of hot dry noodles, a red chili pepper, a plush sword labeled '一把勾践剑' (a sword of Goujian), and a boiled egg. The atmosphere is filled with laughter and playful banter. A male voice asks '是什么?' (What is it?), followed by another male voice declaring '这是一颗水煮蛋' (This is a boiled egg). The Man in white shirt (center focus) reacts with exaggerated discomfort and laughter upon receiving the red chili pepper, with a male voice commenting '你是反拍啊!' (You're off-beat!) and '节奏问题啊!' (Rhythm problem!). The Woman with dark hair, labeled '孟指导上线', actively leads the commentary, questioning the game's rules and rhythm, asking '等一下, 我想知道他给我这个勾践剑的时候我应该说什么?' (Wait, I want to know what I should say when he gives me this Goujian sword?) and '怎么能再节奏里?' (How can it be in rhythm?). The Man with name tag '李晨' actively participates, counting '5, 6, 7, 8' and suggesting '我想想, 我想个办法' (Let me think, I'll find a way). The game intensifies with rapid call-and-response, as multiple voices chant '这是一把勾践剑!' (This is a Goujian sword!) and '这是一颗水煮蛋!' (This is a boiled egg!), interspersed with '是什么?'. The Man in white shirt exclaims '完了, 我这... 谁给抢回去了? 我抢不了!' (It's over, I... Who snatched it back? I can't snatch it!), highlighting his struggle amidst the chaos. The Woman with blonde hair and bow laughs heartily in close-up shots, while other participants in the background contribute to the energetic tone with laughter and movement. On-screen text graphics like '挑战成功' (Challenge Successful) and '惊不惊喜' (Surprised or not?) narrate the game's progression. A Split-Screen Comparison visually emphasizes the messiness on the man’s hands before and after the game. The game concludes with a countdown and a final rapid exchange, including '热干面!' (Hot dry noodles!).

segments.integrated_caption: The minute opens in a brightly lit studio, where participants in white outfits are gathered around a wooden table under the 'Keep Running' logo, creating a playful and energetic atmosphere filled with laughter. A female voice, identified by on-screen text as '孟指导上线' (Meng Director Online), remarks, "这是我玩过最高端的游戏。我都有点读不明白。" (This is the most high-end game I've ever played. I'm a bit confused.), followed by a male voice lamenting, "坏了，我们可能离不开武汉了。" (Oh no, we might not be able to leave Wuhan now.). The 'Meng Director' then asks for a slower pace, "你慢一点. 我这个有点读不明白，你慢一点," to which another male voice responds, "你按照你的节奏来，我们配合你。" (You go at your own pace, we'll cooperate with you.). The scene then transitions into a fast-paced passing game involving a small white bowl of noodles, a red chili pepper, a plush sword, and a boiled egg. The central man in a white shirt reacts with exaggerated discomfort and amusement, especially when handling the chili pepper, while the Woman with blonde hair and bow laughs heartily in close-up. A male voice counts down "3, 2, 1, 走!", initiating a rapid-fire call-and-response game. Participants, including the Man with name tag '李晨' who is seen handing items, repeatedly shout "这是一把勾践剑!" (This is a Goujian Sword!) or "这是一碗热干面!" (This is a bowl of Hot Dry Noodles!) followed by a chorus of "是什么?" (What is it?), with on-screen text graphics like '热干面' and '勾践剑' appearing to match the spoken words. The game intensifies, with the introduction of "这是一颗水煮蛋!" (This is a Boiled Egg!) into the frantic exchange, accompanied by an upbeat, playful background music and continuous overlapping shouts and laughter, culminating in a lively and comedic shared moment.

segments.integrated_caption: The video segment opens with a lively game challenge in a brightly lit studio, featuring the 'Keep Running' logo. After a round, a male voice declares "OK, 挑战成功" (OK, Challenge successful) and "很完美" (Very perfect). (What is it?) and correcting each other on the correct measure words, like "都说棵吧" (Say 'a plant') for the cactus. The Man with name tag '李晨' (Li Chen) actively passes the props, laughing and engaging. The atmosphere remains playful and humorous, with animated on-screen text like '挑战成功' appearing, and a Cartoon Director Character briefly adding comedic critique.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens in a brightly lit studio with a blue 'Keep Running' backdrop, where participants are engaged in a lively game challenge at a wooden table. A rhythmic, game-show-like background music plays as a chorus of voices repeatedly chants "是什么？擀面杖！" (What is it? Rolling pin!), then "是什么？充电宝！" (What is it? Power bank!), and "是什么？仙人掌！" (What is it? Cactus!), corresponding to the on-screen text graphics labeling the props. The Man in white shirt (center focus) is at the heart of the action, reacting with exaggerated discomfort and surprise as the Man with name tag '李晨' actively passes him various game items, including a white power bank and a green plush cactus. The Woman with blonde hair and bow laughs heartily, clearly amused by his animated expressions. As the game intensifies, the chants become faster and more chaotic, punctuated by laughter and excited shouts. The Man in white shirt lets out a loud, exaggerated scream when handling the cactus, prompting more laughter, including the Woman with blonde hair exclaiming "充电宝!" (Power bank!) with a laugh. Following the challenge, the Man with name tag '李晨' humorously remarks on the "仙人宝" (fairy treasure) pun, asking "谁说仙人宝啊？" (Who said 'fairy treasure'?) before declaring "不重要，赢了" (Doesn't matter, we won). The Man in white shirt adds "顺的" (Smoothly). The Man with name tag '李晨' then announces, "恭喜大家挑战成功" (Congratulations everyone, challenge successful), explaining that they "可以获得两个最终马拉松接力赛的赛段信息" (can get two segment information for the final marathon relay race). The scene transitions to a scoreboard graphic titled '“奔跑吧”马拉松接力赛' (Keep Running Marathon Relay Race), displaying distances, while the Man with name tag '李晨' asks "十跟一怎么样？" (How about ten and one?) and another male voice suggests "最好把俩500抽出来" (Better to draw two 500s). The overall tone remains energetic and humorous, enhanced by visual effects and text.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a split-screen, showing a '“奔跑吧”马拉松接力赛' (Keep Running Marathon Relay Race) scoreboard on the left and a man in a white shirt reacting on the right. Playful, suspenseful music and game show sound effects accompany the scene as male voices discuss the difficulty of allocating a 500m segment and emphasize the importance of the first leg, with one participant suggesting it should be 1000m or 1500m, definitely not 500m. The scene transitions to a wider shot where two men in white shirts stand beside the scoreboard, using a yellow measuring tape and pink flower stickers to reveal distances. With exclamations of surprise and excitement, they react to the reveal of '500m' for position 1 and '1000m' for position 10, shouting "500!" and "1000!". They express nervousness, with one exclaiming "好緊張啊 bro" (So nervous, bro), and discuss the implications, noting the impossibility of two 500m legs being adjacent and that no 1500m segments have been revealed yet. On-screen text graphics confirm the revealed distances and summarize known segments: 500m × 1, 1000m × 1, 1500m × 2. The segment concludes with a full-screen graphic titled '《奔跑吧》13公里马拉松接力赛' (Keep Running 13km Marathon Relay Race), listing all 10 legs with known and unknown distances, as an authoritative male voiceover announces that all opportunities to obtain track information have been used up, and the remaining distances must now be inferred by the participants. The atmosphere remains playful with bright lighting and colorful set design.
